status.stdout:
Service: systemd (enabled)
File logs: /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-04-30.log
Command: /usr/bin/node /home/joshu/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/index.js gateway --port 18790
Service file: ~/.config/systemd/user/openclaw-gateway.service
Service env: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=18790

Config (cli): ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json
Config (service): ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json

Gateway: bind=loopback (127.0.0.1), port=18790 (service args)
Probe target: ws://127.0.0.1:18790
Dashboard: http://127.0.0.1:18790/
Probe note: Loopback-only gateway; only local clients can connect.

Runtime: running (pid 60286, state active, sub running, last exit 0, reason 0)
Connectivity probe: ok
Capability: admin-capable

Listening: 127.0.0.1:18790
Troubles: run openclaw status
Troubleshooting: https://docs.openclaw.ai/troubleshooting

command:
{ ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null | grep ':18790 ' | sed -n 's/.*pid=\([0-9][0-9]*\).*/\1/p'; pgrep -f '^openclaw-gateway$' 2>/dev/null || true; } | sort -u > /tmp/otto-wsl-gateway-18790.pids
cat /tmp/otto-wsl-gateway-18790.pids
if [ -s /tmp/otto-wsl-gateway-18790.pids ]; then
  xargs -r kill -TERM < /tmp/otto-wsl-gateway-18790.pids 2>/dev/null || true
  sleep 1
  xargs -r kill -KILL < /tmp/otto-wsl-gateway-18790.pids 2>/dev/null || true
fi
sleep 1
